panels.description: Hours since the last Jira sync attempt and its status. Green ≤ 12 h • Yellow 12–24 h • Red > 24 h or ERROR status. Queries most recent run regardless of success.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - finished_at)) / 3600.0, 1) AS "Age (h)",
  UPPER(status) AS "Status"
FROM sync_log
WHERE finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Data Age

panels.description: Blocker-priority bugs not yet resolved. Target: 0. Escalate immediately.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND status_category != 'Done' AND priority = 'Blocker' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions))

panels.title: Open Blocker Bugs

panels.description: Critical-priority open bugs. Target: 0. Escalate urgently.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND status_category != 'Done' AND priority = 'Critical' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions))

panels.title: Open Critical Bugs

panels.description: High-priority open bugs. Target: ≤ 5. Rising count signals quality regression.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND status_category != 'Done' AND priority = 'High' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions))

panels.title: Open High Bugs

panels.description: Medium and Low priority open bugs. Monitor for trends; no hard target.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND status_category != 'Done' AND priority IN ('Medium', 'Low') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions))

panels.title: Open Medium & Low Bugs

panels.description: New bugs reported each week. A rising trend in high/critical bugs signals quality risk.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'Blocker' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Blocker", SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Critical", SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "High", SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'Medium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Medium", SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'Low' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Low" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Bug Creation Rate by Priority (per week)

panels.description: Total and resolved bugs per release. High unresolved count before a release date is a risk signal.

targets.rawSql: SELECT UNNEST(fix_versions) AS "Release", COUNT(*) AS "Total Bugs", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'Done') AS "Resolved", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category != 'Done') AS "Open" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND fix_versions != '{}' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND date_trunc('quarter', created_at) = '$quarter'::date GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY "Total Bugs" DESC

panels.title: Bugs per Release / Fix Version

panels.description: All open critical and high priority bugs, sorted by age.

targets.rawSql: SELECT key AS "Key", priority AS "Priority", status AS "Status", COALESCE(assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", ARRAY_TO_STRING(fix_versions, ', ') AS "Fix Version", TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "Created", DATE_PART('day', NOW() - created_at)::int AS "Age (days)" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND status_category != 'Done' AND priority IN ('Blocker', 'Critical') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, created_at ASC

panels.title: Open Bugs — Critical & High

panels.description: When resolution rate consistently falls below creation rate, the backlog is growing.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Created" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', resolved_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Resolved" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND $__timeFilter(resolved_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Bug Resolution Rate vs Creation Rate (per week)

panels.description: Total bugs ever assigned to this release via fix_version, including those later moved to another release. Measures initial release quality.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value
FROM issues i
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND $release != 'ALL'
  AND (
    $release = ANY(i.fix_versions)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM issue_fix_version_history fvh
      WHERE fvh.issue_key = i.key AND fvh.fix_version = $release
    )
  )

panels.title: Bugs Ever in Release

panels.description: Bugs that were assigned to this release but later moved to a different fix_version. High count may indicate release scope changes under pressure.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value
FROM issues i
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND $release != 'ALL'
  AND NOT ($release = ANY(i.fix_versions))
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM issue_fix_version_history fvh
    WHERE fvh.issue_key = i.key AND fvh.fix_version = $release
  )

panels.title: Bugs Moved to Another Release

panels.description: Blocker, Critical and High bugs ever assigned to this release. Best indicator of initial release quality risk.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT i.key) AS value
FROM issues i
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND i.priority IN ('Blocker', 'Critical', 'High')
  AND $release != 'ALL'
  AND (
    $release = ANY(i.fix_versions)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM issue_fix_version_history fvh
      WHERE fvh.issue_key = i.key AND fvh.fix_version = $release
    )
  )

panels.title: Major Bugs Ever in Release

panels.description: All bugs that were ever assigned to this fix_version, including those later moved. 'Still in Release' = bug is still in the current fix_versions. Allows assessment of initial release quality vs final state.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  i.key AS "Key",
  i.summary AS "Summary",
  i.priority AS "Priority",
  i.status AS "Status",
  COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  CASE WHEN $release = ANY(i.fix_versions) THEN '✅ Yes' ELSE '➡ Moved' END AS "Still in Release",
  ARRAY_TO_STRING(i.fix_versions, ', ') AS "Current Fix Version(s)"
FROM issues i
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.status != 'Obsolete / Won''t Do'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND $release != 'ALL'
  AND (
    $release = ANY(i.fix_versions)
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM issue_fix_version_history fvh
      WHERE fvh.issue_key = i.key AND fvh.fix_version = $release
    )
  )
ORDER BY
  CASE WHEN $release = ANY(i.fix_versions) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
  CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END,
  i.key

panels.title: All Bugs Ever Assigned to Release

panels.description: Issues confirmed to have a QASE test case linked. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, and issues with status Open or Obsolete / Won't Do.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) AND has_qase_link = TRUE

panels.title: Issues with QASE Link

panels.description: Issues confirmed to have no QASE test case linked. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) AND has_qase_link = FALSE

panels.title: Issues Confirmed Without QASE Link

panels.description: % of active issues (excl. Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, Obsolete) with a QASE test case. Denominator excludes unchecked issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date)

panels.title: QASE Coverage %

panels.description: Issues where QASE status has not been fetched yet. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) AND has_qase_link IS NULL

panels.title: Not Yet Checked

panels.description: Issues with and without a QASE link per issue type. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT issue_type AS "Issue Type", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE) AS "With QASE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = FALSE) AS "Without QASE" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) AND has_qase_link IS NOT NULL GROUP BY issue_type ORDER BY "Without QASE" DESC

panels.title: QASE Coverage by Issue Type

panels.description: Issues confirmed to have no QASE test case, ordered by priority and age. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT key AS "Key", summary AS "Summary", issue_type AS "Type", priority AS "Priority", status AS "Status", COALESCE(assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee", DATE_PART('day', NOW() - created_at)::int AS "Age (days)" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) AND has_qase_link = FALSE ORDER BY CASE priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 WHEN 'Medium' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, created_at ASC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Issues Confirmed Without QASE Link

panels.description: QASE coverage by issue type: total, with link, without link, not checked, coverage %. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT   issue_type AS "Issue Type",   COUNT(*) AS "Total (checked)",   COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE) AS "With QASE",   COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = FALSE) AS "Without QASE",   COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link IS NULL) AS "Not Checked",   ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE)     / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS "Coverage %" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) GROUP BY issue_type ORDER BY "Without QASE" DESC

panels.title: QASE Coverage by Issue Type

panels.description: QASE coverage by issue status. Excludes Epics, Sub-tasks, Open, and Obsolete / Won't Do issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT status AS "Status", COUNT(*) AS "Total (checked)", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE) AS "With QASE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = FALSE) AS "Without QASE", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link IS NULL) AS "Not Checked", ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link = TRUE) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE has_qase_link IS NOT NULL), 0), 1) AS "Coverage %" FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type NOT IN ('Epic','Sub-task')
  AND status NOT IN ('Open', 'Obsolete / Won''t Do') AND ($release = 'ALL' OR $release = ANY(fix_versions)) AND key IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.issue_key FROM sprint_issues si JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id WHERE date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date) GROUP BY status ORDER BY "Without QASE" DESC

panels.title: QASE Coverage by Issue Status

list.label: Jira URL
list.name: jira_url
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.label: Team / Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.label: Quarter
list.name: quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC

list.label: Release / Fix Version
list.name: release
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT unnest(fix_versions) FROM issues WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND issue_type = 'Bug' AND fix_versions != '{}' ORDER BY 1
